basic_details.job_title: Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharathidasan University has published the Project Assistant Notification 2026 on 20 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Assistant position. Candidates up to 28 years of age and holding M.Sc (Biotechnology/Botany/Life Sciences) or M.Tech (Biotechnology) with minimum required marks are eligible to apply via email. The application process will be active from 20 April 2026 to 11 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.details: Project Assistant: M.Sc in Biotechnology/Botany/Life Sciences or M.Tech Biotechnology with a minimum of 55% or 5.79 CGPA (Relaxation for SC/ST: 50% or 5.26 CGPA). Desired: Experience in Plant tissue culture.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Bharathidasan University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant post is 11th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Biotechnology, Botany, or Life Sciences, or an M.Tech in Biotechnology with a minimum of 55% marks or 5.79 CGPA. SC/ST candidates require 50% or 5.26 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, experience in Plant tissue culture is considered a desired qualification for the Project Assistant position. This can give candidates an edge during the selection process.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any age relaxations available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for candidates belonging to the SC/ST categories. This is in addition to the general age limit specified for the post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration for the contract period.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Project Assistant job at Bharathidasan University?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete bio-data and self-attested copies of required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Project Assistant recruitment drive at Bharathidasan University.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will involve an Offline Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for this interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
